sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69339" key="murobala/ninos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῠροβᾰλάν-ινος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰν], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n69339.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">made of</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μυροβάλανος, ἔλαιον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg003:157" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.157</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἄλευρον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:4:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.4</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
